story: Towards the end of the season, Randy Jackson, the last remaining of the original judges, announced that he would no longer serve as a judge to pursue other business ventures. Both judges Mariah Carey and Nicki Minaj also decided to leave after one season to focus on their music careers.
q1: Mariah Carey served as an American Idol judge for multiple seasons before leaving to focus on her music career. (True/False?)
